subtasks.description: Query current month spend and 3-month average spend (including prior months) from the spend warehouse. Calculate variance and percentage deviation from baseline for each vendor/category.

Classify each spend variance as normal_variance, concerning, or critical based on deviation thresholds and variance magnitude. Apply heuristic rules (e.g., >15% normal, 15-50% concerning, >50% critical) and output classification with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to compute current vs. 3-month average spend with variance metrics in a single multi-row query; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile the spend data with classification rules and assign anomaly severity levels. The sql_gen is mid-tier because it requires aggregation across multiple months and variance calculation. The cross_recon is mid-tier because it applies multi-threshold classification logic (normal/concerning/critical) based on deviation signals. No additional policy_action is needed because this is classification, not governance approval. No multitool_plan is needed because the query does not request tool orchestration. Two subtasks is the minimum because reconciliation and classification require output from the initial spend query.

output.sql:
SELECT
  vendor_name,
  current_month_spend,
  avg_3month_spend,
  (current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) AS variance_usd,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_3month_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) * 100, 2)
  END AS pct_deviation,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_3month_spend = 0 THEN 'no_baseline'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) <= 0.10 THEN 'normal_variance'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / avg_3month_spend) <= 0.25 THEN 'concerning'
    ELSE 'critical'
  END AS anomaly_classification
FROM (
  SELECT
    vendor_name,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
       AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
      THEN amount_usd ELSE 0
    END) AS current_month_spend,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
       AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      THEN amount_usd ELSE 0
    END) / NULLIF(
      SUM(CASE
        WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
         AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END), 0
    ) AS avg_3month_spend
  FROM (
    SELECT
      vendor_name,
      DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) AS invoice_month,
      SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd,
      1 AS month_flag,
      invoice_date
    FROM invoice_facts
    WHERE invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
      AND status != 'cancelled'
    GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date), invoice_date
  ) monthly_spend
  GROUP BY vendor_name
) anomaly_base
ORDER BY ABS(pct_deviation) DESC NULLS LAST
